scripts.cordova:prepare: npm run build && npx cordova prepare android
scripts.cordova:build: npm run build && npx cordova build android && cp platforms/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /Volumes/i13/
scripts.cordova:build:release: npm run build && npx cordova build android --release && cp platforms/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk /Volumes/i13/
scripts.cordova:run: npm run build && npx cordova run android
scripts.cordova:emulate: npm run build && npx cordova emulate android
